title: stevia congesta
intro: Stevia congesta, also known as sweetleaf or sweet stevia, is a perennial shrub native to Central and South America, belonging to the sunflower family. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to lower blood pressure and blood sugar levels due to its high content of steviol glycosides, which have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stevia congesta include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, as well as its ability to aid in weight management and improve oral health. Stevia congesta can be consumed as a herbal preparation, commonly available in the form of dried leaves, teas, and extracts, which can be used to make sweetener alternatives and herbal remedies for various health conditions.
